description: POLABDC-class regression-guard. Multi-line `script.src =\n    "https://cdn..."` shape. RHS is a string literal — NOT a variable. Pre-v0.17.5 xss-checker spuriously flagged this because greedy `\s*` in `\s*=\s*(?!['"(`])` would release one whitespace char to satisfy the negative lookahead against whitespace. Fix: add `\s` to negation set so `\s*` cannot release. xss-checker MUST NOT fire on this fixture.
